sections.heading:
Your AI Travel Agent.
Always in Your Pocket.
sections.subheading: Tell Altovia where you want to go — it handles flights, plans your itinerary, finds local experiences, and optimizes your points. Like a travel agent who never sleeps.

sections.heading: Travel Smarter with AI
sections.subheading: From first idea to full itinerary — Altovia does the thinking for you.

items.title: AI That Knows Every Destination
items.description: Tell Altovia where you're going and it builds a full trip plan — local gems, neighborhoods, things to do, and what to skip. Like asking a friend who's been everywhere.

items.title: Smart Flight Search
items.description: Altovia's AI searches across airlines to find the right flight for your trip — not just the cheapest, but the best fit for your schedule, layovers, and preferences.

items.title: Points Optimization on Autopilot
items.description: Connect your loyalty programs and Altovia's AI finds the best way to use them — surfacing award seats and redemptions that take hours to find manually.

items.title: Just Describe Your Trip
items.description: No forms. No filters. Just tell Altovia what you want — "a long weekend in Europe under $800" — and it figures out the rest. Travel planning like a conversation.

items.title: One App for Everything
items.description: Flights, activities, local tips, points tracking — all in one place. Altovia replaces the 5 separate apps and 12 browser tabs you currently need just to plan one trip.

items.title: Personalized, Not Generic
items.description: The more you use Altovia, the better it understands your travel style — and the more tailored your recommendations get. AI that actually learns what you like.

sections.heading: What Travelers Are Saying
sections.subheading: From weekend warriors to digital nomads — they all switched to Altovia.

items.quote: I said 'I want to go somewhere warm for 10 days in March under $1,200 from NYC' and Altovia came back with a full trip to Colombia — flights, neighborhood guide, the works. I was booked in 20 minutes.
items.author: Marcus T.

items.quote: The AI trip planner is genuinely unreal. I asked for hidden spots in Lisbon and got a list of places that weren't in any tourist guide. My friends thought I'd been there before. I hadn't.
items.author: Sophie K.
items.company: Used Altovia for 3 trips last year

items.quote: I used to have 15 tabs open and spend a whole weekend planning one trip. Now I describe what I want, Altovia handles it, and I spend that time actually looking forward to the trip.
items.author: Jessica M.

sections.heading: Let AI Plan Your Next Adventure.
sections.description: Download Altovia free. 7-day full trial — AI trip planning, smart flight search, and points optimization. No credit card needed.

button.label: Download Free — Meet Your Travel AI

sections.heading: How Does It Work?
sections.subheading: Quick answers about Altovia's AI travel features.

items.question: What can I actually ask Altovia's AI?
items.answer: Pretty much anything travel-related: 'Find me a cheap flight to Tokyo in October', 'Plan a 5-day itinerary for Lisbon on a budget', 'What are the best local restaurants in Mexico City?' — it handles search, planning, and recommendations all in one place.

items.question: How is this different from just using ChatGPT for travel?
items.answer: Altovia is connected to real-time flight data, your loyalty accounts, and pricing systems. ChatGPT can suggest itineraries — Altovia can actually book them and find live deals. It's an AI that takes action, not just gives advice.

items.question: Does the AI really plan a full itinerary?
items.answer: Yes. Give it your destination, trip length, and budget and it comes back with a full day-by-day plan including local neighborhoods, activities, food spots, and hidden gems — the kind of intel that usually takes days of research.

items.question: How does it handle my loyalty points?
items.answer: Connect your accounts and Altovia's AI constantly monitors for the best redemption opportunities — award flights, upgrades, and partner deals. It finds the options that take 3 hours to find manually and surfaces them in seconds.

items.question: Is Altovia free?
items.answer: Free to download with a 7-day full trial — no credit card required. After that, plans start affordably. Most users find it saves them far more than the cost on their first trip.
